clips.title: Last Cigarette
clips.prompt: Shot on grainy 16mm film, heavy texture, muted indie palette, imperfect focus breathing. Dusk. A cramped apartment kitchen with peeling wallpaper. A person in a worn cardigan sits at a small table, exhaling a slow drag of smoke, staring at nothing, lost in thought. A cold coffee, a flickering bulb, dust in the light. Soft window light. Raw honest motion, verite soul, flickering exposure, 24fps.
